title: CI pins to unstable canary Bun version, making builds non-reproducible
reasoning: `bun-version: canary` resolves to the latest nightly/canary build of Bun at the time the job runs. Canary builds are inherently unstable: they may contain regressions, breaking changes, or behavioral differences that appear between runs. This makes CI results non-reproducible and can cause spurious failures unrelated to the code under test. A previously green commit can turn red without any code change.
recommendation: Pin to a specific stable Bun version (e.g., `bun-version: '1.2.x'` or an exact version like `'1.2.15'`). Use Dependabot or a periodic workflow to bump the pinned version intentionally.
whyTestsDoNotAlreadyCoverThis: No tests are included for this feature; this is a CI infrastructure concern that manifests as flaky or non-reproducible pipeline runs rather than test failures.
minimumFixScope: Change line 29 from `bun-version: canary` to a pinned stable version.
